[user]What happens to air?
[Ninereeds]Air rests still and invisible.
Heat warms air at ground surface.

Rising air spreads and circles back downward.

[user]What happens in a bite?
[Ninereeds]Upper teeth press down on food.
Lower teeth rise up to meet upper teeth.
Teeth shear through food fibers.
Cheeks hold food pieces between grinding teeth.
Bite is teeth closing together to break food apart.

[user]What happens in a bleed?
[Ninereeds]Blood flows inside sealed vessels.
Vessel wall opens from cut or tear.
Blood pressure pushes blood through the opening.
Blood leaves vessel and spreads into surrounding tissue.
Bleed is blood escaping from a broken vessel.
